topic: My toothbrush is wet every morning before I have used it.
title: My Toothbrush Was Wet Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my toothbrush was already wet before I touched it.
scenes.image_prompt: A single damp toothbrush standing in a ceramic holder on a bathroom sink, water beads on the bristles, dim early light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lived alone in a small upstairs apartment with one bathroom.
scenes.image_prompt: A narrow tiled bathroom in a small apartment, single sink and mirror, faint morning haze through frosted glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My routine never changed. Brush at night. Brush again at dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush holder beside a folded hand towel on a worn sink edge, muted bathroom light, soft fog on the mirror, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the bristles dripped each morning, as if used moments before.
scenes.image_prompt: Close view of toothbrush bristles with a single drop of water falling, dark countertop, dim cold light, vertical 9:16 framing
A bathroom sink seen from a doorway, mirror reflecting an empty room, deep shadow, faint fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked. The faucet was dry. Only the brush was wet.
scenes.image_prompt: A bone dry chrome faucet beside a wet toothbrush in its holder, harsh contrast, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I marked the handle and left it facing the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush turned to face the tiled wall, a small marker line on the handle, low light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it had turned back toward me. Wet again.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush rotated to face outward in its holder, droplets on bristles, pale dawn light, fog on mirror behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started locking the bathroom door from the hallway at night.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed bathroom door at the end of a dim hallway, a small lock on the outside, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It stayed wet. And one morning, mint I had never bought.
scenes.image_prompt: A toothbrush dripping with faint green paste residue, an unfamiliar tube nearby, cold bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw it out and bought a new one. Same thing.
scenes.image_prompt: A fresh sealed toothbrush package on a sink edge, already a damp brush in the holder beside it, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I noticed my towel was always damp too.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand towel hanging crooked on a bathroom hook, a faint wet patch in the fabric, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
